summary: PART I (All monetary amounts are expressed in thousands of US dollars (unless stated otherwise), except for share and loss per share amounts.) On September 20, 2024, the Company implemented a 1-for-10 reverse stock split (the Reverse Split) of its authorized and outstanding shares of Common Stock. All share and per share amounts in these financial statements have been retroactively adjusted to reflect the Reverse Split as if it had been effected prior to the earliest financial statement period i...
